Description: Unique identifier for each customer.
Year of birth of the customer.
Education level of the customer (e.g., Basic, Graduation, PhD, etc.).
Marital status of the customer (e.g., Single, Married, Together, Divorced, Widowed).
Yearly household income of the customer in monetary units.
Number of children in the household.
Number of teenagers in the household.
Date when the customer enrolled with the company.
Number of days since the last purchase.
Amount spent on wine products in the last 2 years.
Amount spent on fruit products in the last 2 years.
Amount spent on meat products in the last 2 years.
Amount spent on fish products in the last 2 years.
Amount spent on sweet products in the last 2 years.
Amount spent on gold products in the last 2 years.
Number of purchases made with a discount.
Number of purchases made through the company’s website.
Number of purchases made using a catalog.
Number of purchases made directly in stores.
Number of visits to the company’s website in the last month.
1 if the customer accepted the first campaign offer, 0 otherwise.
1 if the customer accepted the second campaign offer, 0 otherwise.
1 if the customer accepted the third campaign offer, 0 otherwise.
1 if the customer accepted the fourth campaign offer, 0 otherwise.
1 if the customer accepted the fifth campaign offer, 0 otherwise.
1 if the customer accepted the last campaign offer, 0 otherwise.
1 if the customer has complained in the last 2 years, 0 otherwise.
Constant value used for internal cost tracking (always 3).
Constant value used for internal revenue tracking (always 11).
Sum of all campaign responses (calculated field, optional).
